rationale_overall: Watchlist already has reasonable thematic coverage (AAPL/MSFT/GOOGL for AI-adjacent megacaps, ARKX for space, BOTZ for robotics, URA for uranium/nuclear fuel, SPY/AGG for core). The three adds deepen the two wave buckets the user most wants to ride or front-run: direct AI compute exposure via NVDA and SMH (the watchlist has no semiconductor pure-play yet, which is the gap given the user's explicit AI-wave instruction), and ICLN as a clean-energy proxy for the nuclear-renaissance thesis since dedicated nuclear ETFs are not yet listed. No removes: everything currently held still maps to a named wave bucket and the post-change watchlist size of 11 stays under the cap of 12.
